organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Braude College  of  Engineering, an institution for higher education, strives for excellence in teaching and research in the fields of engineering and science. The college deeply rooted in the local Galilean community. Braude College has established itself as a leading academic institution with worldwide academic and industry ties. The college plays an important role in the development and prosperity of the Galilee.

Mission 
 We are a higher education institution of engineering, technology, and related fields, 
 whose goal is to promote equal opportunities in Israeli society through education and 
 professional training. 

 Vision 
 A leading engineering degree in Israel.

 Braude College confers a Bachelor of Sciences (B.Sc.) degree in the following fields: 
 * Applied Mathematics 
 * Biotechnology Engineering
*Civil Engineering
 * Electrical and Electronic Engineering 
 * Industrial Engineering and Management 
 * Information Systems Engineering 
 * Mechanical Engineering 
 * Software Engineering 

Braude College confers a Master of Sciences (M.Sc.) degree in the following fields: 
 * Biotechnology Engineering 
 * Industrial Engineering and Management 
 * Systems Engineering 
 * Software Engineering

companyResolutionResult.description:
INTERLLIGENT - RF & Microwave Solutions is a market leader in the field of RF solutions. We specialize in RF & microwave technology, and provide in-depth support to our large global customer base. Join our global customer network and benefit from our comprehensive RF knowledge, attractive pricing, extensive infrastructure and versatile capabilities. Our range of complementary RF services and solutions includes: 
RF Training solution: World class RF, microwave and wireless technology training center
Test Equipment services: RF and microwave test equipment rentals, leasing, sales and Asset Management.
RF Components & Test Systems: Representation and technical support in Israel of RF & microwave related companies
Engineering Services: Custom RF & microwave design and on-site measurement services (outsourced solutions)
RF Ventures Incubator: Strategic investments in early-stage RF, microwave and wireless related companies
INTERLLIGENT has offices both in Tel Aviv, Israel (HQ) and in the United Kingdom (since 2010). 

INTERLLIGENT UK
**********************************
Our UK headquarters in London, established in 2010, provides a local point of contact for test equipment rental and RF support services, giving our customers the advantage of a flexible and low-risk strategy for expanding their businesses while controlling their budgets.

With considerable experience in providing customized test equipment solutions since 2000, INTERLLIGENT has developed partnerships with an extensive and loyal list of customers for its test equipment services, including some of the biggest names in the RF and microwave industry. This heritage enables us to offer our UK customers a tailored technical and financial package to suit their exact test and measurement requirements. Our range of RF services is supported by a skilled team with extensive RF knowledge and expertise, combined with a well-established logistics infrastructure.
companyResolutionResult.name: INTERLLIGENT - RF & Microwave Solutions

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
ORT colleges are part of ORT Israel, which was established in 1949 and now includes 150 educational institutions. The network trains students to cope with the accelerated rate of development in the economy and in industry.

ORT colleges devise study curricula adapted to the needs of the country and to future needs, in collaboration with other bodies, such as: the Ministry of Science and Technology, the Ministry of Industry, Trade & Employment, the IDF, high-tech industries and other leading industries in the national economy, both in the private and public sectors.

Our graduates are integrated in the employment market in a wide range of key positions, in high-tech industries, other leading industries, government ministries, in the private market and in a large number of places of employment that require high quality professionals in the technological fields, at all levels.

ORT colleges operate as interdisciplinary education centers, ranging from science and technology studies to the arts, design and communications. The colleges aim to provide a solution for every student, enabling them to successfully meet local and global technological requirements.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: ORT Colleges

companyResolutionResult.description: An award-winning cybercrime threat intelligence firm, KELA's mission is to provide 100% real, actionable intelligence on threats emerging from the cybercrime underground, to support the prevention of digital crimes. Our success is based on a unique integration of our proprietary automated technologies and qualified intelligence experts. Trusted worldwide, our technology infiltrates hidden underground places and thoroughly monitors, hunts, and mitigates digital crimes to uncover real risks and allow proactive protection. KELA’s tailored threat visibility, combined with cybercrime attack surface intelligence, arms you with highly contextualized intelligence, as seen from the eyes of attackers, thus enabling proactive network defense.

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Reichman University (previously IDC Herzliya), the first private institution of higher education in Israel, opened its doors in 1994 thanks to the vision of Prof. Uriel Reichman. Reichman University's ten schools offer innovative, dynamic undergraduate and graduate programs that educate Israel's future business, juridical, high-tech, communications, economics, and civic leaders. 
All of the academic programs provide students with both a solid theoretical background and the practical interdisciplinary skills that are essential for success in the 21st century. 

The university’s alumni are leading key positions at government agencies, high-tech companies, and financial institutions. 

Reichman University is unique in its educational methods, which are based on an interdisciplinary approach and the teaching of information technology and global markets. It combines theory with real-world experience and provides its students with proficiencies. 

Our basic outlook, which is rooted in the twin concepts of individual freedom and responsibility, emphasizes student entrepreneurship and leadership alongside a commitment to community service.

Follow us on all social media channels >>> https://bit.ly/3TVTCJE

מטרת אוניברסיטת רייכמן (לשעבר הבינתחומי) היא להכשיר את מנהיגות העתיד של מדינת ישראל, באמצעות השכלה בינתחומית, המשלבת ידע תיאורטי מעמיק עם הכשרה מעשית, ובהנחיית סגל מרצים וחוקרים מהאוניברסיטאות המובילות בעולם ובישראל. גישתנו היא הקפדה על מצוינות במחקר ובהוראה, לצד דגש על אחריות חברתית ומעורבות בקהילה. מאז הקמתו, הצליח הבינתחומי הרצליה להיות חלוץ בתחומים רבים ולהוביל מהפכה במערכת ההשכלה הגבוהה בישראל, שאת עקבותיה ניתן לראות כיום במוסדות אקדמיים אחרים.

עקבו אחרינו בכל הרשתות החברתיות >>> https://bit.ly/3TVTCJE

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Welcome to she codes;!
she codes; is a community of women in technology, created to reach 50% of software developers woman within a decade in Israel. Founded in 2013 by Ruth Polachek, today she codes; includes approximately 50,000 members.
Our members include women who want to learn software development or make a career shift into high-tech, developers who want to advance their skills and network with other women in high-tech and high school students who are learning to program. Our core values are Believe in Yourself, Perseverance, and Community.
We operate over 40 branches all over Israel. Branches include programming learning tracks and project co-working with support from community volunteers. In addition, there are enriching and interesting lectures at the branches which grant tools and vital programming knowledge, as well as coding skills, inspirational and career lectures. These lectures are also open to women who are not members of the branch.
Volunteer opportunities at she codes; contribute to the personal and professional development of members.
Branches, learning track planning, events, and more are all volunteer-run.

A new learning cycle opens at the beginning of every quarter in each of the branches around the country.
The meetings and the activity in the branches form a framework which allows personal and professional development.
Even more important, the meetings give an opportunity to meet more women - to form professional relationships with experienced women who love to program and talk tech.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: she codes;

Our vision is to enable our customers and our staff, personal and business growth through a qualitative learning experience, both professional and innovative.

companyResolutionResult.description:
Liacom Systems specializes in comprehensive consultation services to projects in the fields of  Cyber Security and Information Technology.  The company has operated  in the ICT market for over 25 years and employs some 150 highly experienced, senior consultants with extensive technical, operational and commercial knowledge. 
Liacom Systems provides professional services in a broad range of Telecommunications and IT areas and assists clients with all phases of project development and implementation from the planning and strategic development phase (requirement definition, review, development of master plan),  through system design and application (engineering, regulation, specification)  and including as well marketing and evaluation.

Since its foundation in 1994, Liacom Systems has acquired a  thorough knowledge base in the field of Cyber security. Our expertise is based on a wealth of  practical experience in developing and integrating a broad range of systems and technologies available in  the market.  Liacom Systems has  the knowledge and experience necessary  to address all  aspects of data security in an organization – operational, organizational and technological and provide innovative insights and solutions.

Liacom Systems consultants have the capacity to handle a comprehensive  range of security issues during all  stages of project design and development.  We are also well-equipped to  carry out general, organization-wide activities, such as risk surveys, threat discovery and analysis, security policy design, regulatory definitions, technology research,  and the custom design  and development of specially-crafted tools and security solutions.
companyResolutionResult.name: Liacom Systems Ltd.

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
The Adelson School of Entrepreneurship's honors program was established to give its graduates tools to cope with two critical needs of the modern economy of the 21st century:
• Establishing new and innovative businesses (entrepreneurship)
• Establishing new projects within existing organizations (intrapreneurship)

The program participants come from different disciplines: entrepreneurship-business administration, entrepreneurship-computer science, and entrepreneurship-economics.
 
The students in the program are characterized by extraordinary admission data (Matriculation GPA, Psychometric score, military/social/entrepreneurial background) and are carefully selected by the admissions committees of the School of Entrepreneurship.

As part of the program, each student receives personal guidance from a leading industry mentor, participates in special activities organized by the Adelson School of Entrepreneurship in collaboration with Israel and abroad industry officials, studies in small groups with senior lecturers from academia and industry, and much more!
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Adelson’s Honors Program, Reichman University

companyResolutionResult.description:
Apiiro is an Agentic Application Security Platform that governs AI-generated code and eliminates backlogs with an AutoFix AI Agent.

Apiiro acts as a force-multiplier for application security, software development, and risk management teams – enabling them to design, develop, and deliver secure software faster in the AI era by unifying risk visibility and automating threat models, risk prioritization, remediation, and prevention.

Leading enterprises including Walmart, USAA, TIAA, Morgan Stanley, BlackRock, Bloomberg, SoFi, and Shell rely on Apiiro’s patented Deep Code Analysis (DCA) technology to build a software intelligence layer by continuously discover, inventory, and visualize their software architecture from code to runtime - enabling them to detect, prioritize, and prevent application risks at scale.

✅ RSA Innovation Sandbox 2021 Winner
✅ Gartner 2021 Cool Vendor in DevSecOps
✅ Gartner #1 ASPM in the AST MQ 2025
✅ IDC #1 ASPM in 2025

Backed by Greylock, Kleiner Perkins and General Catalyst.
companyResolutionResult.name: Apiiro

We have deep functional and industry expertise as well as breadth of geographical reach. We are passionate about taking on immense challenges that matter to our clients and, often, to the world.

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
In the academic environment in Israel, the Open University of Israel is similar to other universities in its pursuit of excellence and its commitment to superior scientific and scholastic standards. However, it differs in its organizational structure, its curriculum, and its admission requirements. 

The Open University is open to all those who wish to study a single course or a battery of courses, or to pursue a full program of study toward a Bachelor's degree. Enrollment does not require matriculation or any other certificate from another educational institution. Though applicants are not required to provide proof of prior scholastic achievements, their academic achievements are the key to their success at the Open University. Along with its open admission policy, the Open University demands of its students personal qualities without which academic achievements cannot be attained: ambition, motivation, perseverance, responsibility and self-discipline. Students are required to study on their own, practice at home, actively participate in group learning activities, and meet course deadlines and requirements. 

Since 1996, the Open University has offered programs of study leading to a Master's degree. In contrast to the open admission policy for undergraduate studies, admission to graduate studies is contingent on fulfillment of certain requirements. 
The Open University is flexible in structure and organization. Applicants joining the Open University student body are not required to enroll in a faculty or department, but rather in specific courses. An individual enrolled in a course becomes a student of the Open University. 

The structure of studies at the Open University also differs from the structure customary at other universities, as it is not defined by years. Open University students are not first, second or third year students. Student are entitled to determine their own rate of progress and the degree of progress in not measured by units of time ...
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: The Open University of Israel

Ben-Gurion University of the Negev is one of Israel’s leading research universities and among the world leaders in many fields. 

It has around 20,000 students and 4,000 faculty members in the Faculties of Engineering Sciences; Health Sciences; Natural Sciences; the Pinchas Sapir Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences; the Guilford Glazer Faculty of Business and Management; the Joyce and Irving Goldman School of Medicine; the Kreitman School of Advanced Graduate Studies; and the Albert Katz International School for Desert Studies. More than 100,000 alumni play important roles in all areas of research and development, industry, health care, the economy, society, culture and education in Israel.

The University has three main campuses: The Marcus Family Campus in Beer-Sheva; the research campus at Sede Boqer and the Eilat Campus, and is home to national and multi-disciplinary research institutes: the National Institute for Biotechnology in the Negev; the National Institute of Solar Energy; the Ilse Katz Institute for Nanoscale Science and Technology; the Jacob Blaustein Institutes for Desert Research; the Ben-Gurion Research Institute for the Study of Israel & Zionism, and Heksherim - The Research Institute for Jewish and Israeli Literature and Culture.

resumePosition.details:
• Used C++ and OpenCV for the logic and interfacing with the firmware/hardware, wrote multi threaded code in a real time environment.
• Wrote embedded firmware code for RISC-V processors for ensuring laser safety on our device.
• Lead the UI/UX design and development, ensuring a user-friendly interface tailored to medical professionals.
• Built in a high throughput (25 GB/Min per recording source) event driven recording pipeline in C++, data included video and json formats.
• The pipeline used chunking and compression for improved efficiency.
• Partnered with hardware and optics teams to control, automate and take measurements from different test devices to reduce device usage overhead and cut down daily device calibration time from 2hr to 30 min.
• (C++ for the backend and React.
• js Typescript for the frontend).
• Also used Python (numPy) for data manipulation of the calibration results.
• Introduced a Shopify Shipit merge queue and self-hosted Ruby on Rails + Redis + PostgreSQL to serialize merges, re-validate, and keep main green; enforced branch protections and eliminated manual rebase churn, cutting CI time roughly in half and shifting dev time back to feature work.

• Developed criminal case management software used by law enforcement, enabling the examination of encrypted digital evidence, case creation, and evidence upload via a React-based interface.
• Improved the system by introducing advanced filtering and rapid data extraction from large databases, enhancing usability and performance.
• Wrote Unit tests in Jest and MSTest; Automation using Gherkin and cypress.
• Made CI/CD more efficient by combining our Gated Pipeline and our Unit Test and Automation pipelines into one pipeline as different jobs using YAML and Python.
• Took part in a special inner company hackathon, designing an AI Assistant Chatbot for our product using Python.
• Using PineCone AI for processing the user's query, ElasticSearch to find the best match in our manual, and presenting the user with the result using a GPT model.

• In order to design and test these new Graphene PCBs, I had to use my knowledge and skills in electronics and RF, especially because these were extremely fast switching PCBs (100 Gigs per lane) that imposed challenges not seen in regular switching PCBs, such as crosstalk and interferences more commonly found in RF systems.
• Developed and optimized various software tools for GNSS receiver systems and conducted comprehensive system testing and integration.

organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: University of Florida

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Approximately 36 years before Israel declared independence, a ceremony took place on the barren slopes of Mount Carmel near the Port of Haifa, which was then occupied by the Ottoman Empire. Unknown to the Haifa community witnessing the event, this would be a milestone in history. This first cornerstone embodied an implausible vision of creating a world-class institute of scientific and technological education in the Holy Land.
The story of the “Technikum” – the original German name of the Technion – is a tale of the century. The second industrial revolution created the printing presses and communications infrastructure allowing Jews scattered around the globe to organize in face of rising anti-Semitism. As Jews were often barred from technical education, the establishment of a technical school was a first priority to rebuilding a Jewish homeland. The Technion was to become a unique worldwide university that would precede, create, shape, and protect a modern state.
The cornerstone laid on April 11, 1912, set in motion a century of progress responding to national and global needs. Technion – Israel Institute of Technology would grow rapidly, becoming a global pioneer in fields such as biotechnology, stem cell research, space, computer science, nanotechnology, and energy. 
Four Technion professors have won Nobel Prizes. As it approaches its centennial in 2025 – 100 years after the first class took place – Technion City is a thriving world center of trailblazing excellence in research and teaching for the benefit of humanity, with 18 faculties, more than 14,000 students, 135 academic programs, and 60 research institutes. Since the Technion opened its doors, more than 90,000 Technion alumni have played a huge part in creating and leading the ‘Startup Nation,’ impacting the lives of millions of people worldwide.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Technion - Israel Institute of Technology

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Combining world-class academic excellence with a unique approach to education and social responsibility, SCE is much more than a college; it is a source of inspiration and cultivation which encourages forward-thinking and facilitates significant achievements. "Engineering the future" is both our promise and our mission, which propels our students forward and leads them to set an example of excellence amongst their peers and within their communities. With two campuses located in southern Israel, a continuously growing body of over 6,000 students, six different engineering tracks and new faculty of design and architecture, SCE is, and will always be, a pioneering academic powerhouse. 

At SCE, engineering goes way beyond the academic framework; it is a way of thinking, analyzing and solving fundamental questions that design the way people live their lives. Driven by a vision of outstanding education and social responsibility, SCE is committed to the pursuit of excellence, innovation, and promoting all communities. It is noteworthy that since its founding the Sami Shamoon College of Engineering has qualified more than 11,000 BA and MA graduates that comprise an integral part of the SCE and its future. More than 95% of our graduates are employed in their profession and education field, and more than 30% have pursued advanced degrees. SCE graduates, that currently make up about 15% of the total number of engineers working in high-tech fields in Israel, are the SCE’s main contribution to the growth of Israel’s economy and security.
